ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 按条目 — 根据嵌套缩进

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 单列 — 所有图标靠左对齐

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used by every folder that hasn’t set its own flow override, and as the fallback when a folder points at a flow that no longer exists.
ast.target: 用于所有未设置自身流程覆盖的文件夹，以及当文件夹指向的流程不再存在时作为后备。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace this flow’s statuses with a built-in template. Destructive — use "Save as new flow" first if you want to keep the current statuses.
ast.target: 用内置模板替换此流程的状态。此操作具有破坏性 — 如果想保留当前状态，请先使用“另存为新流程”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clone this flow under a new name.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folders pointing at this flow will revert to the default flow.
ast.target: 指向此流程的文件夹将恢复为默认流程。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Drag a row to reorder. Click Edit to drill into the status (label, character, shell, icon, colours).
ast.target: 拖动行以重新排序。点击编辑以深入查看状态（标签、字符、外壳、图标、颜色）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Must be unique across all flows. Used in front-matter as the value of `task-flow:` on folder configs that want to point at it.
ast.target: 在所有流程中必须唯一。用作指向它的文件夹配置中 `task-flow:` 的值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Built-in flow used as the starting statuses.
ast.target: 用作起始状态的内置流程。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Must be unique across all flows.
ast.target: 在所有流程中必须唯一。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shown in the status menu and as the row title.
ast.target: 显示在状态菜单中并作为行标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Single character that lives inside the `[ ]` on disk. Stick to the community alphabet (space, x, /, >, -, ?, d, …) for the best theme coverage.
ast.target: 磁盘上 `[ ]` 内的单个字符。为获得最佳主题覆盖，请坚持使用社区字母表（空格、x、/、>、-、?、d、…）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On — the status counts as still-open work. Off — treated as completed (hidden when the user toggles "Hide completed").
ast.target: 开启 — 该状态仍算作进行中的工作。关闭 — 视为已完成（当用户切换“隐藏已完成”时隐藏）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The status this one transitions to on left-click.
ast.target: 左键单击时，此状态转换到的状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lucide names ship with Obsidian. Emoji renders as text. Image takes a vault-relative or absolute URL. SVG accepts raw markup (sanitised before render).
ast.target: Lucide 名称随 Obsidian 附带。表情符号渲染为文本。图片接受保险库相对或绝对 URL。SVG 接受原始标记（渲染前会进行清理）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pasted SVG is sanitised before render — script tags, event handlers, and javascript:/data: URLs are stripped. Invalid markup is silently dropped at paint time.
ast.target: 粘贴的 SVG 在渲染前会进行清理 — 脚本标签、事件处理器和 javascript:/data: URL 会被剥离。无效标记在绘制时会被静默丢弃。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Foreground for monochrome glyphs (Lucide, monochrome SVG).
ast.target: 用于单色字形（Lucide、单色 SVG）的前景色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How much of the shell the icon fills. ~0.7 leaves a small ring of background. 1.0 fills the whole shell box (use for shape "none").
ast.target: 图标填充外壳的程度。~0.7 会留下一圈背景。1.0 会填满整个外壳框（用于形状“无”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frame around the icon. "None" hides the shell entirely (useful for icon-only statuses like a coloured chevron).
ast.target: 图标周围的边框。“无”会完全隐藏外壳（适用于仅图标的图标状态，如彩色箭头）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Leave clear for an outlined / transparent shell.
ast.target: 留空以获得轮廓/透明外壳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bind an icon to a tag (e.g. #important → ★). Signifiers render in reading view, live preview, and the plugin’s task lists, anywhere the tag appears.
ast.target: 将图标绑定到标签（例如 #important → ★）。标记会在阅读视图、实时预览以及插件的任务列表中渲染，只要标签出现的地方。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On — reading view shows only the signifier icon. Off — it shows the icon and the tag. (The plugin’s task lists always hide the tag.)
ast.target: 开启 — 阅读视图仅显示标记图标。关闭 — 同时显示图标和标签。（插件的任务列表始终隐藏标签。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On — live preview shows only the signifier icon (the tag reappears while the cursor is on it, so it stays editable). Off — the tag stays visible.
ast.target: 开启 — 实时预览仅显示标记图标（当光标位于其上时标签会重新出现，以便保持可编辑）。关闭 — 标签保持可见。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When hiding tags in live preview: on — putting the cursor anywhere on a line shows all of that line’s tags; off — only the tag the cursor touches is shown. No effect when tags aren’t hidden.
ast.target: 在实时预览中隐藏标签时：开启 — 将光标放在行上的任何位置会显示该行的所有标签；关闭 — 仅显示光标触及的标签。当标签未隐藏时无效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Both options hang the icon in the left margin, positioned by measurement so they hold up across themes and snippets. The plugin’s own task lists always render inline.
ast.target: 两个选项都将图标悬挂在左侧边距中，通过测量定位，以便在不同主题和代码片段中保持稳定。插件自身的任务列表始终内联渲染。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Indent the note content just enough that the icons never clip when readable line width is off or the view is narrow. On by default.
ast.target: 缩进笔记内容，刚好足够使图标在可读行宽关闭或视图较窄时不会被裁剪。默认开启。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Group tasks by tag at the top of every task list. Tasks matching a category’s tags are listed under it. Reorder with the arrows — the order here is the section order.
ast.target: 在每个任务列表的顶部按标签对任务进行分组。匹配类别标签的任务列在其下。使用箭头重新排序 — 此处的顺序即为章节顺序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On — a categorized task appears both under its category and in its note group. Off — only under its category. Uncategorized tasks always appear under their note.
ast.target: 开启 — 已分类的任务会同时出现在其类别下和其笔记分组中。关闭 — 仅出现在其类别下。未分类的任务始终出现在其笔记下。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Space- or comma-separated. The first tag is the one the “Modify signifiers on line” command inserts.
ast.target: 空格或逗号分隔。第一个标签是“修改行上的标记”命令插入的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Space- or comma-separated. Tasks with any of these tags are listed under this category.
ast.target: 空格或逗号分隔。带有这些标签中任何一个的任务都会列在此类别下。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The sidebar tab is the entry point for journaling-related actions (folder picker, calendar, configuration editor, initialise). Open it via the calendar ribbon icon.
ast.target: 侧边栏选项卡是日记相关操作的入口（文件夹选择器、日历、配置编辑器、初始化）。通过日历功能区图标打开它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rendered as the title of a daily note.
ast.target: 渲染为每日笔记的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for compact in-line links to daily notes.
ast.target: 用于指向每日笔记的紧凑内联链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for links to daily notes that fall in a different year.
ast.target: 用于指向不同年份的每日笔记的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use 'gg' or 'gggg' (not 'YY' / 'YYYY') for the year component so it tracks the ISO/locale week year.
ast.target: 年份部分请使用 'gg' 或 'gggg'（而非 'YY' / 'YYYY'），以便跟踪 ISO/区域设置的周数年份。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rendered as the title of a weekly note.
ast.target: 渲染为每周笔记的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for compact in-line links to weekly notes.
ast.target: 用于指向每周笔记的紧凑内联链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for links to weekly notes that fall in a different year.
ast.target: 用于指向不同年份的每周笔记的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rendered as the title of a monthly note.
ast.target: 渲染为每月笔记的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for compact in-line links to monthly notes.
ast.target: 用于指向每月笔记的紧凑内联链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for links to monthly notes that fall in a different year.
ast.target: 用于指向不同年份的每月笔记的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rendered as the title of a quarterly note.
ast.target: 渲染为每季度笔记的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for compact in-line links to quarterly notes.
ast.target: 用于指向每季度笔记的紧凑内联链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for links to quarterly notes that fall in a different year.
ast.target: 用于指向不同年份的每季度笔记的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rendered as the title of a yearly note.
ast.target: 渲染为每年笔记的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for compact in-line links to yearly notes.
ast.target: 用于指向每年笔记的紧凑内联链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Plugin-wide task behaviour that isn’t bound to a specific flow. The Today / Dynamic and Show / Hide completed quick toggles live on the sidebar itself.
ast.target: 插件范围内的任务行为，不绑定到特定流程。“今天/动态”和“显示/隐藏已完成”的快速切换位于侧边栏本身。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A task flow is a named set of statuses (label, character, cycle target, and visuals). Folders pick which flow they use; edits here flow through to every folder pointing at the same flow. Built-in templates are read-only — apply one to seed a new flow. Click a flow to drill into its detail.
ast.target: 任务流程是一组命名的状态（标签、字符、循环目标和视觉效果）。文件夹选择它们使用的流程；此处的编辑会流向指向同一流程的每个文件夹。内置模板是只读的 — 应用一个模板来创建新流程。点击一个流程以深入查看其详情。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The flow that drives this folder's task icons and cycles. Flow contents are edited globally \u2014 pick "Use default" to inherit whatever the global default flow is at the time tasks render.
ast.target: 驱动此文件夹任务图标和循环的流程。流程内容是全局编辑的 — 选择“使用默认值”以继承任务渲染时全局默认流程的任何内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the task-migration commands insert copied tasks in the destination note.
ast.target: 任务迁移命令在目标笔记中插入复制任务的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Heading migrated tasks are placed under (matched case-insensitively; created as a level-2 heading if missing).
ast.target: 迁移的任务放置在其下的标题（不区分大小写匹配；如果缺失则创建为二级标题）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Migration can link the two notes: a forward link on the original task and a back link on the migrated copy. Turn either off to omit that link entirely.
ast.target: 迁移可以链接两个笔记：原始任务上的正向链接和迁移副本上的反向链接。关闭任一选项可完全省略该链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a link to the destination note on the migrated-from task.
ast.target: 在迁移来源的任务上添加指向目标笔记的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a link back to the origin note on the migrated-to task.
ast.target: 在迁移目标的任务上添加指向来源笔记的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text accepts any characters (the defaults are the → and ← arrow glyphs). Emoji and Lucide each add a picker; Lucide markers are stored as “lucide:name” tokens and render as icons in reading view. Switching style resets both markers to that style’s defaults; you can still edit each one.
ast.target: 文本接受任何字符（默认值是 → 和 ← 箭头字形）。表情符号和 Lucide 各添加一个选择器；Lucide 标记存储为“lucide:name”标记，并在阅读视图中渲染为图标。切换样式会将两个标记重置为该样式的默认值；您仍然可以编辑每个标记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fades the whole reference (marker + link) in reading view so it recedes until you look for it. Hovering restores full opacity. Needs a non-empty marker to detect the reference.
ast.target: 在阅读视图中淡化整个引用（标记 + 链接），使其在您寻找之前退隐。悬停会恢复完全不透明度。需要非空标记来检测引用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restores every setting in the plugin to its default.
ast.target: 将插件中的所有设置恢复为默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hides every 'journal-folder.md' note from Obsidian's built-in file explorer. The notes still exist on disk and remain accessible via search and the sidebar.
ast.target: 从 Obsidian 的内置文件资源管理器中隐藏所有“journal-folder.md”笔记。这些笔记仍然存在于磁盘上，并且可以通过搜索和侧边栏访问。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Off — every new journal note (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly) is seeded with the same default template. On — pick a separate template for each note type. The two modes are mutually exclusive.
ast.target: 关闭 — 每个新的日记笔记（每日、每周、每月、每季度、每年）都使用相同的默认模板。开启 — 为每种笔记类型选择单独的模板。两种模式互斥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this option is checked, and a journal folder title is not configured at folder level, the folder name will be used as title for the journal folder.
ast.target: 如果勾选此选项，并且日记文件夹标题未在文件夹级别配置，则文件夹名称将用作日记文件夹的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hard cap on the number of tasks rendered in the sidebar and in-note blocks. When exceeded, a footer appears with a link back here to increase the limit.
ast.target: 侧边栏和笔记内块中渲染的任务数量的硬性上限。超出时，会出现一个页脚，其中包含一个返回此处以增加限制的链接。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在阅读视图中隐藏标签

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在实时预览中隐藏标签

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Reveal tags on the active line

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Reserve left margin for gutter signifiers
ast.target: 为装订线标记保留左侧边距

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Also show categorized tasks under their note
ast.target: 同时在其笔记下显示已分类的任务

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 引用不透明度（阅读视图）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中隐藏 journal-folder.md

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use a different template per note type
ast.target: 为不同笔记类型使用不同模板

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Save flow under a new name

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Paste any emoji into "Custom emoji" below — the system picker (⌃⌘Space on macOS, Win+. on Windows) covers everything not in this grid.
ast.target: 将任意表情符号粘贴到下方的“自定义表情符号”中——系统选择器（macOS 上为 ⌃⌘Space，Windows 上为 Win+.）涵盖了此网格中未包含的所有内容。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%cReading a derived belonging to a now-destroyed effect may result in stale values
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert
ast.target: %c[svelte] derived_inert\n%c读取属于已销毁效果的派生值可能导致过时的值\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载状态代理，而非组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA \`<svelte:boundary>\` \`reset\` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This flow has no migrated status configured. Set one on the flow in plugin settings (Tasks → the flow → Migrated status).
ast.target: 此流程未配置迁移状态。请在插件设置中为该流程设置一个（任务 → 该流程 → 迁移状态）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可迁移的活动任务。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A flow needs at least one status.
ast.target: 一个流程至少需要一个状态。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This status is this flow's migrated status, which must stay completed. Choose a different migrated status on the flow page before making this one active.
ast.target: 此状态是此流程的迁移状态，必须保持为已完成状态。请在流程页面上选择一个不同的迁移状态，然后再将此状态设为活动状态。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No other journal notes in this folder to migrate into.
ast.target: 此文件夹中没有其他日志笔记可迁移至此。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active tasks in this note to migrate.
ast.target: 此笔记中没有可迁移的活动任务。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active tasks in this folder to migrate here.
ast.target: 此文件夹中没有可迁移至此的活动任务。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active task on the current line to migrate.
ast.target: 当前行上没有可迁移的活动任务。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Every setting on this screen will be restored to its default value. This cannot be undone.
ast.target: 此屏幕上的所有设置都将恢复为默认值。此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 修改当前行的标记符号…

ast.name: name
ast.source: Toggle task / advance status on current line
ast.target: 切换当前行的任务/推进状态

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tip: use "Save flow as new flow…" first if you want to keep the current statuses.
ast.target: 提示：如果您想保留当前状态，请先使用“将流程另存为新流程…”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This status no longer exists — it may have been removed. Use the breadcrumb above to return to the flow.
ast.target: 此状态已不存在——可能已被移除。请使用上方的面包屑导航返回流程。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No icon — the shell stands on its own (e.g. an empty ring or a filled circle).
ast.target: 无图标——外壳独立存在（例如一个空心圆环或一个实心圆）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Couldn't find the journal-folder.md for this folder. It may have been renamed or deleted.
ast.target: 找不到此文件夹的 journal-folder.md 文件。它可能已被重命名或删除。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Migrate the task on the current line

ast.name: title
ast.target: 初始化一个新的日志文件夹
